testsuite.name: com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.controller.ChatControllerTest
testsuite.system-out: 2025-08-21T17:03:45.496+09:00 INFO 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 메시지 수신: roomId=test-room-001, content=정산을 취소합니다 2025-08-21T17:03:45.542+09:00 INFO 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 정산 상태 업데이트 브로드캐스트: roomId=test-room-001, settlementId=test-settlement-001 2025-08-21T17:03:45.544+09:00 INFO 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 메시지 브로드캐스트 완료: roomId=test-room-001, messageId=response-003 2025-08-21T17:03:45.629+09:00 INFO 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 메시지 수신: roomId=test-room-001, content=정산 거절합니다 2025-08-21T17:03:45.630+09:00 INFO 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 정산 상태 업데이트 브로드캐스트: roomId=test-room-001, settlementId=test-settlement-001 2025-08-21T17:03:45.631+09:00 INFO 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 메시지 브로드캐스트 완료: roomId=test-room-001, messageId=response-002 2025-08-21T17:03:45.643+09:00 INFO 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 메시지 수신: roomId=test-room-001, content=정산 승낙합니다 2025-08-21T17:03:45.643+09:00 INFO 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 정산 상태 업데이트 브로드캐스트: roomId=test-room-001, settlementId=test-settlement-001 2025-08-21T17:03:45.644+09:00 INFO 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 메시지 브로드캐스트 완료: roomId=test-room-001, messageId=response-001 2025-08-21T17:03:45.655+09:00 INFO 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 메시지 수신: roomId=test-room-001, content=정산 승낙합니다 2025-08-21T17:03:45.655+09:00 WARN 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 정산 상호작용에 settlementId 없음: messageType=SETTLEMENT_ACCEPT 2025-08-21T17:03:45.655+09:00 INFO 14672 --- [ Test worker] c.s.h.c.d.c.controller.ChatController : 메시지 브로드캐스트 완료: roomId=test-room-001, messageId=response-004
